executable.title: Apply Pixel Classifier
executable.description: Apply a trained pixel classifier model to a whole-slide image. Downloads the model from Girder, runs inference patch-by-patch, and posts a prediction overlay annotation back to the target slide item.

string.name: item_id
string.label: Target Slide Item ID
string.description: Girder item ID of the whole-slide image to apply the classifier to.

string.name: model_item_id
string.label: Model Item ID
string.description: Girder item ID containing the trained model.pkl file uploaded by BuildPixelClassifier.

string.name: job_dir
string.label: Output Directory
string.description: Container-internal path for temporary files during inference.

parameters.label: Girder API URL and Key
parameters.description: Auto-injected by Slicer CLI Web; do not set manually.
